calendarFaqs.q: Does Long Beach Unified School District have a fall break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Long Beach Unified School District has a fall break running from Nov 24, 2025 to Nov 28, 2025, a total of 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Long Beach Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Long Beach Unified School District is Tuesday, August 26, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Long Beach Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Long Beach Unified School District is Thursday, June 11, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Long Beach Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Long Beach Unified School District runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 2, 2026, 12 days. School resumes Jan 5, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Late Start
yearNumbers.detail: LBUSD starts August 26 — 12 days after LAUSD (Aug 14), the latest start among major Los Angeles-area districts.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: LBUSD observes a full Fall Break week rather than a shorter Thanksgiving holiday — a distinctive calendar structure among Southern California districts.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Day
yearNumbers.detail: Lincoln's Birthday is observed as a separate school holiday on February 9, in addition to Presidents' Day — two consecutive-week holidays in February that families often miss.

yearNumbers.label: Late Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break falls in early April, roughly two weeks after LAUSD's late-March spring break, creating misaligned breaks for families with children in both districts.

calendarNotes: Long Beach Unified begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 26, 2025 — approximately 12 days after LAUSD. Spring Break runs April 6–10, 2026, about two weeks later than LAUSD's late-March spring break. The school year ends June 11, 2026.
